name: Eggplant Dal Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the eggplant in a 400-degree oven for an hour, piercing it first with a fork.
2. About 20 minutes before the eggplant is done, add mustard seeds to a medium saucepan.
3. Add lentils, water, and spices; bring to a boil and gently simmer until the eggplant is finished cooking.
4. Remove the eggplant from the oven, slit open, scoop out the innards, and chop coarsely.
5. Add the chopped eggplant to the lentils and cook another 5-10 minutes to blend all the flavors.
This would probably make a respectable soup if thinned out with more water and broth, but I served it over pasta.
